generated_by: Claude Code (CodemIE) — derived from automated Playwright test files
scope: Manual test cases aligned to automated tests — 32 test cases
note: Steps reflect InvenTree v1.3.0 React SPA. All selectors use aria-label attributes (Mantine UI). No time.sleep() — use wait_for_selector / networkidle.

test_cases.title: Create part with required fields only

steps.action: Click [aria-label='action-menu-add-parts'] to open the Add Parts menu

steps.expected: Name field shows the entered text

steps.action: Fill [aria-label='text-field-description'] with '10K Ohm Resistor for test UI-P-001'
steps.expected: Description field shows the entered text
'UI-P-001 Resistor' is visible in the list

steps.action: Find part PK via API GET /api/part/?search=UI-P-001+Resistor&limit=50

steps.expected: Part detail page loads showing 'UI-P-001 Resistor'

assertions: Part name visible in list after creation
API returns part with correct name
Detail page body contains 'UI-P-001 Resistor'

test_cases.title: Create part with optional IPN field

steps.action: Open Add Part modal (same as UI-P-001 steps 1-2)

steps.expected: Modal closes, part visible in list
Page shows 'UI-CAP-002' on the detail view

assertions: Part appears in list
Detail page body contains 'UI-CAP-002'

test_cases.title: Duplicate a part via the UI action menu
preconditions: A part named 'UI-P-003 Original Part' exists (create via API)
Admin logged in, browser on that part's detail page

steps.action: Click [aria-label='action-menu-part-actions'] to open the Part Actions menu

steps.expected: Duplicate part modal opens pre-filled with source part data

steps.action: Search for 'UI-P-003 Duplicate Part' via API
steps.expected: Part found with a new PK distinct from the original

assertions: Duplicate part PK is not null
Original part still exists at original PK
cleanup: Deactivate + delete both the original and duplicate parts via API

test_cases.title: Validation error shown when part name is missing
preconditions: Admin logged in, part creation modal open

steps.expected: Validation error message visible near the name field

assertions: Modal remains open after submission attempt
Name field area shows a validation error
No new part is created (API search returns 0 results)

test_cases.title: Validation error shown for duplicate IPN
preconditions: A part with IPN 'DUP-IPN-005' already exists (create via API POST /api/part/ with IPN='DUP-IPN-005')

steps.expected: Error message displayed near IPN field indicating uniqueness violation

assertions: IPN field shows error
Modal stays open
API still returns only one part with that IPN
cleanup: Delete the pre-existing part with IPN 'DUP-IPN-005' via API

test_cases.title: Part name at exactly 100 characters is accepted

steps.action: Fill name with a string of exactly 100 'A' characters (AAAA...×100)

assertions: No validation error shown
Part appears in the list
cleanup: Deactivate + delete the part via API

test_cases.title: Part name exceeding 100 characters is rejected

steps.action: Fill name with a string of exactly 101 'A' characters

steps.expected: Validation error shown (field too long or max length constraint)

assertions: Validation error is shown for the name field
Modal stays open
No part created

test_cases.title: Delete an inactive part via the UI
preconditions: Part deactivated via API PATCH /api/part/{pk}/ {active: false}
Admin logged in, browser on that part's detail page (after page reload)

steps.action: Verify Delete option in actions menu: click [aria-label='action-menu-part-actions']
steps.expected: Delete option is enabled (not greyed out, active part would have it disabled)

steps.action: Wait for [role='dialog'] button:has-text('Delete') to be visible
steps.expected: Confirm Delete button is visible in modal
Page settles — likely redirects away from the deleted part

assertions: API returns 404 after deletion
Modal closed without error

Select template 'UI-P-027 Resistance' from the template dropdown
Enter value '10000' in the value field

test_cases.title: Parameters tab always visible on part detail

test_cases.title: Parameter accepts positive, zero, and negative values
preconditions: A part exists for each value (3 separate parts or reuse one with cleanup)
A parameter template exists for each test value

steps.action: Repeat for each value in [100, 0, -1]: navigate to part detail, open Parameters tab, click Add Parameter
steps.expected: Add parameter modal opens each time

steps.action: Select template, enter value (100 first, then 0, then -1), click Submit each time
Observe Parameters tab after each submission
steps.expected: The entered value is visible in the parameters table

assertions: Value '100' visible after first submission
Value '0' visible after second submission
Value '-1' visible after third submission

test_cases.title: End-to-end: Create part → Add parameters → Create stock → Verify in category
preconditions: Category 'XF Test Category' created via API
Parameter template 'XF Resistance' created via API

steps.action: Navigate to Parts list (/web/part/category/index/parts), open Add Part modal
Fill name 'XF Test Part', description 'Cross-functional test part', select category 'XF Test Category', click Submit
steps.expected: Modal closes, 'XF Test Part' visible in list

steps.action: Look up part PK via API GET /api/part/?search=XF+Test+Part&limit=10
Navigate to part detail /web/part/{pk}/, click Parameters tab, click Add Parameter action, select template 'XF Resistance', enter value '4700', click Submit
steps.expected: Modal closes, 'XF Resistance' visible on Parameters tab

steps.action: Navigate to Stock tab (/web/part/{pk}/stock), click [aria-label='action-button-add-stock-item'], fill quantity '25' in [aria-label='number-field-quantity'], click Submit
Navigate back to Stock tab and check content
steps.expected: '25' is visible in the stock table
Page loads, 'XF Test Part' is visible in the parts table

steps.action: Mask dynamic content via JavaScript, take screenshot

assertions: Part created via UI is findable via API
Parameter 'XF Resistance' with value '4700' visible on part detail
Stock quantity '25' visible on Stock tab
Part visible in the category's Parts sub-tab
Visual snapshot passes 10% pixel diff threshold
